steps.title: Use the contrast
steps.content: The sentence contrasts the idea that Greco-Roman sculpture idealizes human subjects with the reality that many sculptures depict people in another kind of way. The blank should therefore mean the opposite of idealizing.

steps.title: Reject other adjectives
steps.content: A means shallow, B means unbelievable, and D means vague or inaccurate. None directly contrasts with presenting subjects in an idealized or appealing way. The remaining word means presenting someone negatively or unattractively. The answer is C.
